# task\-graph\-core — Graphify context enrichment core module
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core
readiness: not_eligible  reason: status_done

Build a core module that reads Graphify output \(graph\.json, concepts, file metadata\) and enriches Waystation briefs with codebase context\. This is best\-effort — missing or stale Graphify data degrades gracefully\. Graphify data informs briefs but never decides task status, claims, or completion\.

## Acceptance
- src/core/graph\.ts exports loadGraphData\(root, graphPath?\): CommandResult\<GraphData\>\. Reads graphify\-out/graph\.json \(or configurable path\) and validates against a minimal zod schema\.
- GraphData includes: nodes \(functions, classes, files\), edges \(calls, imports, dependencies\), concepts \(topics, summaries\), and file metadata \(size, language, last modified\)\.
- Brief enrichment: brief\.ts calls loadGraphData\(\) and adds three optional fields to the Brief interface: relatedFiles \(files connected to task\.path\_hints via graph edges\), concepts \(topics matching the task scope/description\), impactHints \(warnings about files that depend on or are depended\-by the touched paths\)\.
- Graph data missing or invalid → brief still succeeds, fields are empty arrays\. No crash, no degraded status\.
- Path to graph output is configurable via \.waystation/config\.json \(graph\_path field, defaults to graphify\-out/\)\.
- bun:test: loads mock graph data, verifies brief enrichment when graph is present; verifies brief is unaffected when graph is missing\.
- typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate all clean\.
